hero.badge: AI-powered healthcare journeys for patients and doctors
hero.lead: Book care, prepare for visits, manage records, and use AI guidance in one connected healthcare platform built for the UAE market.
hero.supportCaption: AI health support and intake guidance
hero.sideTitle: One place for booking, records, messaging, and AI support.
hero.sideBody: Patients move from symptom questions to the right care path, while doctors manage schedules and intake from the same platform.

featureSection.title: Everything you need for modern care
featureSection.lead: Approved UX ideas from the external branch, mapped onto the product surfaces that already exist in this repo.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: Book appointments against real doctor availability with a smoother patient journey.

records.title: Digital Records
records.description: Keep appointments, prescriptions, and medical history connected in one secure place.

prescription.title: Prescription Tracking
prescription.description: Review active medication history and stay aligned with follow-up care.

intake.title: Pre-Visit Intake
intake.description: Prepare ahead of appointments with structured forms, autofill, and AI summaries.

aiChat.title: AI Health Chat
aiChat.description: Get guided health support and move directly into the right next step when care is needed.

secure.title: Secure Experience
secure.description: Built around privacy, role-aware access, and a healthcare-first data model.

howItWorksSection.title: How it works
howItWorksSection.lead: Get started quickly, then keep your care journey connected.

one.title: Create your account
one.description: Get started as a patient or doctor with the right onboarding path from day one.

two.title: Find care quickly
two.description: Search doctors, book appointments, and prepare with AI-guided intake before visits.

three.title: Stay connected
three.description: Access records, prescriptions, messages, and next-step guidance in one place.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.lead: Join patients and doctors using CeenAiX for smarter booking, better preparation, and more connected healthcare journeys.

hero.lead: DHA-compliant, NABIDH-certified, and trusted by 50,000+ patients across the UAE. Experience AI-powered healthcare that truly knows you.

features.lead: Comprehensive care management powered by cutting-edge AI — built for patients, doctors, and administrators alike.

ai.title: AI-Powered Diagnostics
ai.description: Advanced machine learning analyzes your health data to surface early warnings and personalized recommendations before symptoms arise.

compliance.title: DHA-Compliant & NABIDH
compliance.description: Fully certified by the Dubai Health Authority with end-to-end encryption, meeting every UAE healthcare data regulation.

guardian.title: 24/7 Health Guardian
guardian.description: Round-the-clock AI monitoring and access to your complete health record, anywhere and anytime across the UAE.

teams.title: Integrated Care Teams
teams.description: Seamless real-time collaboration between your doctors, pharmacists, and lab specialists on a unified platform.

monitoring.title: Real-time Monitoring
monitoring.description: Live vitals tracking, instant lab result alerts, and smart medication reminders keep you and your care team in sync.

premium.title: Premium Care Experience
premium.description: Dubai's most trusted healthcare platform — recognized by over 200 facilities and 50,000 active patients.

how.title: Simple, Seamless, Secure
how.lead: Three steps to your intelligent healthcare journey

one.title: Create Your Account
one.desc: Sign up with your Emirates ID in under 5 minutes. Instant verification through DHA systems.

two.title: Connect Your Records
two.desc: Securely import your existing health records, insurance, and prescription history automatically.

three.title: Start Your Journey
three.desc: Your AI health guardian is activated. Get insights, book appointments, and stay ahead of your health.

one.name: Dr. Sarah Al Maktoum
one.quote: CeenAiX has completely transformed how I manage patient care. The AI insights surface critical patterns I might have missed, and the integrated workflow saves me hours every day.

two.name: Fatima Al Rashidi
two.quote: I can see all my health records, book appointments, and chat with my doctor from one place. The AI assistant caught a potential drug interaction my pharmacist hadn't flagged.

three.name: Ahmed Hassan
three.quote: The prescription dispensing workflow and drug interaction checker have made our pharmacy significantly safer and faster. The NABIDH integration works flawlessly.

security.title: Your Data, Fully Protected
security.lead: Built from the ground up for UAE healthcare compliance. Every record is encrypted at rest and in transit, with granular access controls and full audit trails.

dha.label: DHA-Certified Infrastructure
dha.desc: Meets all Dubai Health Authority requirements

encryption.label: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.desc: AES-256 encryption for all patient data

nabidh.label: NABIDH Compliance
nabidh.desc: Full integration with national health registry

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.lead: Flexible pricing for individuals, providers, and large organizations

provider.name: Healthcare Provider

finalCta.lead: Join thousands of patients and healthcare providers across the UAE who trust CeenAiX to deliver intelligent, secure, and seamless care.

shell.headline: Secure healthcare access built for patients and clinicians.
shell.subhead: Access your care journey, communicate securely, and move through the CeenAiX platform with role-based experiences designed for patients and clinicians.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in with email and password or request a phone OTP to access your role-specific dashboard.
login.descriptionRecovery: Create a new password to continue securely into CeenAiX.
login.rolePatientDesc: Access your health records, appointments & medications
login.roleLabDesc: Process samples, manage imaging & NABIDH submissions
login.roleAdminDesc: Monitor platform health, users & organization management
login.demoModeBody: Click "Sign In" to enter the {role} portal with pre-loaded sample data.
login.otpHint: We'll send a one-time code to the phone number associated with your account.

register.title: Create your CeenAiX account
register.description: Follow the staged sign-up flow for patients and doctors. Choose how you want to authenticate, define your role, and complete the first account setup step.
register.roleStepHint: This keeps the sign-up journey aligned with the plan you chose.
register.resettingSession: Resetting the current session so you can start a new registration flow.
register.modeEmailDesc: Create your account with your email address and password.
register.modePhoneDesc: Ideal for mobile-first registration with a one-time verification code.
register.rolePatientDesc: Access appointments, records, prescriptions, and AI-assisted support.
register.roleDoctorDesc: Manage patient interactions, appointments, prescriptions, and future schedule flows.
register.termsLabel: I agree to the platform terms and understand that healthcare data is handled according to CeenAiX privacy and consent requirements.
register.otpNextHint: We'll create the account and send a verification code to this number in the next step.

errors.resendNeedEmail: Enter your email address first so we know where to resend the confirmation link.
errors.fullNameShort: Please enter the full name that should appear on the account.
errors.emailRequired: Email is required for email and password registration.
errors.passwordShort: Choose a password with at least 8 characters.
errors.phoneRequired: Phone number is required for phone OTP registration.
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. If you did not receive the confirmation email yet, resend it below. Otherwise sign in or reset your password.

register.successAccountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm your account, then continue to onboarding. If you do not see it soon, use the resend button below.
register.resendSuccess: We sent a fresh confirmation email. Check your inbox and spam folder, then open the link to continue.

roleAccess.title: Select your role
roleAccess.descriptionLogin: Choose the portal that matches your role to continue
roleAccess.descriptionRegister: Choose the portal that matches your role to continue
roleAccess.description: Choose the portal that matches your role to continue
roleAccess.sidebarDescription: One platform. Every stakeholder. Full DHA compliance.

patient.title: Patient
patient.description: Access your health records, appointments & medications

lab.title: Lab & Radiology
lab.description: Process samples, manage imaging & NABIDH submissions

admin.title: Platform Admin
admin.description: Monitor platform health, users & organization management

forgot.descriptionRequest: Enter your account email and we will send a secure reset link.
forgot.descriptionRecovery: You are in recovery mode. Set a new password to regain access to your account.
forgot.resetInfo: We'll send a secure reset link to this email. The link routes back into CeenAiX so you can create a new password safely.

otp.title: Verify your secure access
otp.description: Enter the code sent to your registered phone number or email to continue with sign-in or account creation.
otp.signupFlow: This code will complete account creation.
otp.signinFlow: This code will sign you in.
otp.resentOk: A new verification code has been sent.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.description: Finish the first authenticated setup so CeenAiX can route you to the correct experience and prepare your profile data for future workflows.

fields.addressPlaceholder: Add your preferred address for care coordination
fields.bioPlaceholder: Summarize your expertise and patient care focus
fields.termsConfirm: I confirm the profile information is accurate and consent to use CeenAiX according to the platform terms.

doctor.specHelperError: Specializations could not be loaded yet.
doctor.specHelperOk: Search and choose one or more specialties. Selected items appear as chips.

buttons.useAnotherAccount: Sign out and use another account

errors.mustSignIn: You must be signed in to complete onboarding.
errors.emailRequiredOtp: Email is required when signing up with phone OTP.
errors.termsRequired: Please accept the terms to complete onboarding.
errors.specializationRequired: Select at least one specialization to complete doctor onboarding.

onboarding.successSaved: Onboarding saved. Redirecting to your dashboard...

accountSecurity.title: Account Security
accountSecurity.subtitle: Update your password or remove a test account that has no retained care data.
accountSecurity.changePasswordLead: Use a new password for future sign-ins.
accountSecurity.errorPasswordShort: Use at least 8 characters for your new password.
accountSecurity.errorPasswordMismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
accountSecurity.deleteLead: For safety, self-delete only works for accounts without clinical or shared care data.
accountSecurity.deleteWarningSuffix: to confirm. If you already have appointments, prescriptions, records, or shared care threads, contact support instead of self-deleting.
accountSecurity.errorTypeDelete: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion.
accountSecurity.confirmDeleteDialog: Delete this account now? This cannot be undone. Accounts with clinical or shared care data cannot self-delete.

previewPinGate.title: Preview access
previewPinGate.subtitle: This environment is not public yet. Enter the access code to continue.
previewPinGate.invalidPin: That code is not valid. Try again.
previewPinGate.footerNote: You will stay signed in to this preview until you log out of your account or close this browser tab.
